projects.title: Lumen OS
projects.description: A marketing site for a next-generation operating system, built around a kinetic type system and WebGL hero.

sections.challenge: Lumen needed a launch site that signalled platform ambition without falling into generic SaaS tropes.
sections.solution: We built a kinetic identity, a custom typography stack and a WebGL hero that reacts to the user's cursor.
sections.result: Launch week traffic exceeded targets by 240% and the site was featured across major design publications.

projects.title: Nova Finance
projects.description: A complete product redesign for a fintech challenger bank, focused on clarity and trust.

sections.challenge: The legacy product had grown organically and confused new users at every step.
sections.solution: We rebuilt the information architecture and shipped a calm, modular design system across web and mobile.
sections.result: Activation rates climbed 62% and support tickets dropped by a third in the first quarter.

projects.title: Atlas Motion
projects.description: A title sequence and brand film for a documentary series exploring modern cartography.

sections.challenge: Convey the romance of mapmaking without leaning on cliché globe-and-compass visuals.
sections.solution: We crafted a typographic title sequence anchored in topographic line work and tactile film grain.
sections.result: The series debuted to critical acclaim and the open titles were nominated for a Promax award.

projects.title: Ember Social
projects.description: A year-long social system for a fast-growing lifestyle brand across Instagram and TikTok.

sections.challenge: Move from one-off posts to a coherent visual language that scaled across channels.
sections.solution: We built a modular content system with templates, motion presets and a tone-of-voice guide.
sections.result: Engagement grew 4x year-on-year and the brand crossed 1M followers within 9 months.

projects.title: Vox Campaign
projects.description: A multi-channel paid campaign for the launch of a flagship pair of studio headphones.

sections.challenge: Cut through a crowded audio market on a tight launch window.
sections.solution: We led art direction, production and media planning across OOH, paid social and YouTube pre-roll.
sections.result: Hit 110% of launch revenue target in week one and sold through inventory within a month.

projects.title: Harbor
projects.description: An editorial website for a coastal hospitality brand, built around long-form storytelling.

sections.challenge: Translate the feeling of a place into a digital surface without resorting to stock photography.
sections.solution: We commissioned an original photo essay and built a magazine-style site with custom scroll choreography.
sections.result: Direct bookings grew 78% in the first six months and average session time tripled.

projects.title: Kite App
projects.description: Product design for a calm productivity tool aimed at independent makers.

sections.challenge: Build a focus-first experience in a category dominated by feature-heavy competitors.
sections.solution: We led product strategy and shipped an opinionated, distraction-free interface across platforms.
sections.result: Reached 50k MAU in the first year with zero paid acquisition.

projects.title: Forma Film
projects.description: A brand film for an architectural practice known for adaptive reuse projects.

sections.challenge: Capture the studio's philosophy of working with existing buildings, not against them.
sections.solution: A two-week shoot across three projects, edited around a spoken word piece commissioned for the film.
sections.result: Used as the centrepiece of the studio's biennale presentation and three new commissions followed.
